D

Database - Class in org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.database
Manages database connectivity and initialization using the Singleton pattern.
Database(String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.database.Database
Creates a new database connection and initializes required tables.
db - Variable in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.tables.DeveloperTable
Singleton instance of the Database connection handler used for executing SQL queries related to Developer data.
db - Variable in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.tables.GameTable
Singleton instance of the Database connection handler used to execute all SQL operations in this DAO.
db - Variable in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.tables.PlatformTable
Singleton instance of the Database connection handler used for executing SQL queries related to Platform data.
DBConfig - Class in org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.database
Utility class responsible for persisting and loading database configuration.
DBConfig() - Constructor for class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.database.DBConfig
Prevent instantiation of utility class.
DBConst - Class in org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.database
Centralized database schema definitions including table names, column names, constraints, and SQL creation statements.
DBConst() - Constructor for class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.database.DBConst
Utility class - should not be instantiated.
dCB - Variable in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.tabs.AddItemTab
ComboBox for selecting a Developer entity.
deleteGame(int) - Method in interface org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.dao.GameDAO
Deletes a game by its unique identifier.
deleteGame(int) - Method in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.tables.GameTable
Deletes a game from the database using its unique ID.
DeleteItemTab - Class in org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.tabs
JavaFX tab for deleting existing Game entries from the library.
DeleteItemTab() - Constructor for class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.tabs.DeleteItemTab
Constructs the DeleteItemTab and initializes all UI components, including the game selection ComboBox and delete button.
DEV_COLUMN_ID - Static variable in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.database.DBConst
Primary key for developers table.
DEV_COLUMN_NAME - Static variable in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.database.DBConst
Name of the developer or studio.
devCredits() - Static method in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.utils.NodeConsts
Displays a modal dialog showing developer credits.
developer - Variable in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.pojo.Game
Developer name of the game
Developer - Class in org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.pojo
Represents a Developer entity in the system.
Developer(int, String) - Constructor for class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.pojo.Developer
Constructs a Developer object.
DeveloperDAO - Interface in org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.dao
Data Access Object (DAO) interface for managing Developer entities.
DeveloperTable - Class in org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.tables
Data Access Object implementation for Developer entities.
DeveloperTable() - Constructor for class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.tables.DeveloperTable
Private constructor to prevent instantiation.
